footer.companyDescription: Emergency response and family safety platform providing peace of mind through advanced protection services.

pricing.title: Your Core Protection Subscription
pricing.subtitle: One simple subscription that unlocks professional emergency protection. Add optional extras — Family Access, Regional Call Centers, and Safety Devices — anytime. Activate instantly in the app.
pricing.familyDesc: After you join, you can invite trusted family members or carers to your dashboard. They'll have secure access to your emergency profile and protection status, receive instant alerts, view GPS location during an SOS, and help coordinate a rapid response. All data is encrypted and GDPR-compliant, with granular permission controls for complete peace of mind.
pricing.safetyProductsDesc: Enhance your safety with our Bluetooth-enabled emergency devices that work seamlessly with all subscription plans
pricing.productSpecs: Complete product specifications and setup information
pricing.heroSubtitle: 7-day free trial. No card required to start.
pricing.addOnsSubtitle: Enhance your protection after joining. Add from your dashboard anytime.
pricing.callCentreNote: Professional call centre support (Spain only) is available as a separate add-on via our regional partner. Not included in any plan by default.

basePlan.name: Individual
basePlan.description: Essential protection for one person. Everything you need to stay safe.

familyLink.name: Family Link
familyLink.description: Add family members to your protection circle.

dailyWellbeing.name: Daily Wellbeing
dailyWellbeing.description: Daily wellness check-ins powered by CLARA AI.

claraComplete.description: Automatically unlocked when you activate both Daily Wellbeing and Medication Reminder. Full CLARA AI experience at no extra cost.

hero.description: LifeLink Sync provides multilingual emergency protection with AI Guardian, professional call center access, and family connectivity — globally available.
hero.subtitle: One-touch SOS. Clara answers instantly. Your family coordinated. Protection for everyone, at every age.

features.familyDescription: See exactly where your loved ones are, get instant alerts when they need help, and coordinate care seamlessly across your entire family network.
features.familyNetworkDesc: Connect all family members with secure, role-based access to location and emergency information.
features.emergencyAlertsDesc: Instant notifications when someone activates SOS, with location data and response coordination.
features.monitoring247Desc: Professional monitoring and family alerts ensure someone is always watching over your loved ones.
features.connectFirstFree: Connect your first family member for free • No setup fees
features.title: Complete Emergency Protection Suite
features.description: Professional emergency protection with global call center access, Bluetooth device support, and AI monitoring — starting from €4.99/month with worldwide coverage.

items.title: 24/7 Emergency Response
items.description: One-tap SOS activation with instant GPS location sharing to emergency contacts and professional call center.

items.title: AI Health Monitoring
items.description: Intelligent wellness tracking with Premium Protection plan including AI-powered health insights.

items.title: Global Call Center Access
items.description: Professional emergency response coordination available 24/7 with multilingual support worldwide.

items.title: Family Emergency Alerts
items.description: Instant SOS notifications to up to 5 emergency contacts with Family Connection and Premium plans.

items.title: GPS Location Tracking
items.description: Real-time location sharing during emergencies with precise coordinates sent to responders.

items.title: Bluetooth Device Support
items.description: Compatible with LifeLink Sync Bluetooth Pendant for hands-free emergency activation up to 100m range.

familyConnections.title: Family & Carers Connections
familyConnections.description: Build a secure network of trusted family members and carers who can provide support, monitor wellbeing, and coordinate care during both everyday situations and emergencies.

features.title: Trusted Family Network
features.description: Connect family members and carers with secure access levels, role-based permissions, and encrypted communication channels.

features.title: Real-time Emergency Alerts
features.description: Instant notifications to all connected family members with location data, emergency type, and response coordination tools.

features.title: Location Sharing Control
features.description: Privacy-controlled location sharing with customizable permissions, geofencing alerts, and activity tracking for peace of mind.

features.title: Care Coordination Hub
features.description: Seamless coordination between family members and carers with shared calendars, notes, medication reminders, and care plans.

features.title: Privacy & Access Controls
features.description: Granular settings for information sharing, access levels, and communication preferences with full transparency and control.

features.title: 24/7 Family Support
features.description: Professional support available to all connected family members with expert guidance and emergency response coordination.

cta.title: Start Building Your Family Care Network
cta.description: Connect with your loved ones and create a secure support system that works for everyone in your family.

appDownload.title: Meet Clara - Your AI Assistant
appDownload.subtitle: Experience the future of emergency support with intelligent AI assistance
appDownload.heroDescription: Advanced AI technology that understands your needs, learns from interactions, and provides instant, intelligent emergency support 24/7.

intelligentSupport.title: Intelligent Support
intelligentSupport.description: Natural language processing for instant help and emergency assistance

learningAI.title: Learning AI
learningAI.description: Gets smarter over time, adapting to your specific needs and preferences

instantResponse.title: Instant Response
instantResponse.description: Immediate AI-powered assistance available 24/7 in multiple languages

bullets.noFees: No setup fees or hidden costs

appDownload.cancellationDescription: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. Hardware purchases are non-refundable but carry a 1-year warranty.
appDownload.welcomeMessage: 👋 Hi! I'm Clara, your intelligent AI assistant. I'm here to help with emergency setup, family connections, and answer any questions!
appDownload.userQuestion: How do I set up family members?
appDownload.claraResponse: I'll guide you through adding family members step by step. It's really simple! 🚀

regionalCenterES.intro: 24/7 bilingual emergency support for residents and visitors in Spain.
regionalCenterES.heroDescription: Our trained agents speak English and Spanish and can coordinate emergency services, provide live translation, and assist with follow-up.
whatWeDo: Live translation between English and Spanish during emergency calls
Coordination with local emergency services and first responders
Follow-up and case updates until resolution
whenToContact: You need help communicating with emergency services in Spain
You prefer to speak in English or Spanish during an urgent situation
You are traveling in Spain and need assistance
You need help coordinating with family or caregivers
You have an urgent device or subscription issue impacting your safety
regionalCenterES.confidentialityDesc: All calls are recorded for safety and training. Personal data is handled according to our Privacy Policy.
regionalCenterES.noEmergency: If you are in immediate danger, call 112 (Spain's emergency number).

finalCta.title: Ready to Protect Your Family?

common.compatible: Compatible with Alexa, Google Assistant & Apple HomeKit
common.responseDescription: Connect your smart devices and emergency contacts for instant, hands-free protection when you need it most
common.deviceIntegrationDescription: Connect your smart speakers, Bluetooth pendant, and mobile devices for comprehensive emergency protection that activates with your voice or a simple button press.
common.smartSpeakerDesc: Say "help, help, help" three times on any smart device for instant emergency activation when your hands aren't free.
common.bluetoothPendantDesc: Wearable device with one-button emergency activation. Works up to 100 meters from your phone with instant SOS alerts.
common.voiceRecognitionDesc: Advanced AI recognizes distress calls, unusual sounds, or specific trigger words to automatically activate emergency protocols.

ecosystem.title: How It All Connects
ecosystem.subtitle: Your complete protection ecosystem — every feature working together.
ecosystem.memberDesc: At the centre of everything. One account, full protection.
ecosystem.claraDesc: Your safety companion. Answers every SOS, assesses situations, coordinates response.
ecosystem.addOnsDesc: Enhance your protection: Family Link, Daily Wellbeing, Medication Reminders.
ecosystem.familyDesc: Up to 10 contacts coordinated simultaneously. Live GPS, calls, and alerts.
ecosystem.emergencyDesc: SOS triggers instant response — contacts called, GPS shared, ETA shown.
ecosystem.pendantDesc: Wearable Bluetooth button. No phone needed to trigger full platform response.
ecosystem.claraCompleteDesc: Everything included — base plan plus all add-ons in one package.

howItWorks.title: From SOS to safe — in seconds.
howItWorks.subtitle: Whether it's your 17-year-old daughter out at night or your mum at home alone — LifeLink Sync responds the same way. Instantly. Intelligently.
howItWorks.step1Desc: App button or Bluetooth pendant — fires in under 3 seconds. No phone needed for pendant.
howItWorks.step2Desc: "Are you okay? I'm here." Clara, your AI safety companion, responds to every SOS immediately.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Clara assesses the situation through conversation — is this a false alarm or a real emergency?
howItWorks.falseAlarmDesc: Clara confirms you're safe. Incident logged quietly. No alerts sent to contacts. No fuss.
howItWorks.liveGpsSent: Live GPS link sent to each contact
howItWorks.etaShown: ETA shown — how long to reach you
howItWorks.pageSubtitle: Emergency coordination reimagined with AI. Simple, fast, and always available.
howItWorks.readySubtitle: Talk to Clara right now. Chat, call, or request a video call in seconds.
howItWorks.availabilityNotice: Available in English & Spanish • 24/7 • Free to start

step1.title: Press Your Emergency Button
step1.description: Activate LifeLink Sync with one tap from your phone, or use a Flic button for instant access.

step2.title: All Contacts Ring Simultaneously
step2.description: Your emergency contacts all receive calls at once, not one-by-one. Get help 15x faster than traditional systems.

step3.title: Clara AI Joins to Coordinate
step3.description: Our AI coordinator Clara joins the call, greets everyone, captures ETAs, and keeps responders updated in real-time.

step4.title: Help Arrives Faster
step4.description: Your location is shared automatically. Everyone knows who's coming, when they'll arrive, and what's needed.

callback.title: 60-Second Callback
callback.description: Click the phone icon in chat to talk to our team in under 60 seconds. No waiting, no forms.

bilingual.title: English & Spanish Support
bilingual.description: Switch languages instantly. Clara and our team speak both English and Spanish fluently.

video.title: Video Calls Available
video.description: Need to show something? Request a video call for face-to-face assistance.

available247.title: 24/7 Availability
available247.description: Clara never sleeps. Get help anytime, day or night, 365 days a year.

memory.title: Perfect Memory
memory.description: Clara remembers every interaction. She knows your history and provides personalized assistance.

chatAndCall.title: Chat & Call Anytime
chatAndCall.description: Prefer text? Chat with Clara. Need to talk? Click to call. You choose how to connect.

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.message: LifeLink Sync is an emergency coordination tool. It is NOT a replacement for 911 (US) or 112 (EU).
disclaimer.step2: Then use LifeLink Sync to notify your contacts
disclaimer.step3: Do not delay calling official emergency services

features.title: Every layer of protection, built in.
features.subtitle: A complete emergency protection platform — not just an app.
features.oneTouchSosDesc: App button or Bluetooth pendant — fires in under 3 seconds. Instant activation, no fumbling.
features.claraAiDesc: Your safety companion. Clara answers every SOS call, assesses the situation, and coordinates the response.
features.liveLocationDesc: GPS coordinates and ETA sent to every emergency contact in real time. Know exactly where help is needed.
features.familyNetworkDesc: Up to 10 contacts coordinated simultaneously. Everyone notified at once — calls, messages, and live map.
features.pendantDesc: Wearable emergency button. No phone needed to trigger a full platform response. Ideal for elderly users.
features.dashboardsDesc: The right view for every role. Individual member view, family coordination view, and admin operations.

callCentre.title: Professional Call Centre Support
callCentre.description: Optional add-on via a trusted Spanish partner. 24/7 staffed professional call centre, separate from the LifeLink Sync app. Available to members based in Spain.
callCentre.disclaimer: This service is provided by an independent partner and is available to members based in Spain only. It operates alongside — not as part of — the LifeLink Sync app.

kiosk.title: Lock Screen to This App
kiosk.description: For a truly always-on experience, enable screen pinning so the tablet stays on this dashboard permanently.

android.step1Desc: Go to Settings → Security → Screen Pinning and turn it on
android.step2Desc: Open Recent Apps (square button), tap the app icon at the top, and select "Pin"
android.step3Desc: Go to Settings → Display → Screen timeout → set to "30 minutes" or use Developer Options to set "Stay awake while charging"
android.tip: Keep the tablet plugged in and it will stay on indefinitely with these settings.

ipad.title: iPad / Other devices
ipad.desc: Go to Settings → Display & Brightness → Auto-Lock → set to "Never". For iPad, also enable Guided Access in Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access for kiosk mode.

deviceSetup.question: How do I set up my emergency device?
deviceSetup.answer: To set up your emergency device: 1) Download the LifeLink Sync mobile app, 2) Create an account or log in, 3) Go to 'My Products' and tap 'Add Device', 4) Follow the pairing instructions displayed on your screen. The device will automatically connect to your account once properly configured.

sosButton.question: What happens when I press the SOS button?
sosButton.answer: When you press the SOS button: 1) Your location is shared with your emergency contacts, 2) Emergency services are contacted based on your plan, 3) A monitoring agent is alerted to assess the situation, 4) Your family members receive instant notifications with your location and status.

emergencyContacts.question: How do I update my emergency contacts?
emergencyContacts.answer: You can update your emergency contacts by going to the Emergency section in your dashboard. Click 'Edit' next to any contact to modify their information, or use 'Add Contact' to include new emergency contacts. Make sure to keep this information current for the best emergency response.

locationSharing.question: Can I share my location with family members?
locationSharing.answer: Yes! You can enable location sharing with family members in the Location section of your dashboard. You can control who sees your location, set up safe zones for automatic notifications, and choose when location sharing is active.

subscription.question: How do I manage my subscription?
subscription.answer: Visit the Subscription section in your dashboard to view your current plan, billing history, and payment methods. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. For family plans, you can also manage family member access from this section.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure and private?
dataSecurity.answer: Yes, we take your privacy and security seriously. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never share your personal information with third parties except for emergency services when you activate SOS. You can control your privacy settings in your dashboard.

batteryLife.question: How long does the battery last on emergency devices?
batteryLife.answer: Battery life varies by device model, but most of our emergency devices last 3-7 days on a single charge with normal usage. In emergency mode, devices can operate for 24-48 hours continuously. We recommend charging your device weekly.

testSystem.question: Can I test my emergency system?
testSystem.answer: Yes! You can perform a test from your dashboard without triggering actual emergency services. Go to Settings > Emergency Test to send test notifications to your contacts and verify your system is working properly.
